scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @whatsapp-connector/api && npm run build --workspace @whatsapp-connector/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @whatsapp-connector/api" "npm run dev --workspace @whatsapp-connector/web"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @whatsapp-connector/api && npm run test --workspace @whatsapp-connector/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @whatsapp-connector/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @whatsapp-connector/web
